item.title: 纳斯达克德克萨斯交易所将于周四收盘时正式全面启动运营
item.description: 纳斯达克将于周四正式启动其德克萨斯交易所的全面运营，此前美国监管机构已批准其上市规则。【原文：Nasdaq will mark the full operational launch of its Texas exchange on Thursday, following U.S. regulatory approval of ​its listing rules.】

item.title: 独家：特朗普谈伊朗行动期间油价上涨："涨就涨吧"
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周四表示，他不担心因伊朗冲突扩大而推高的美国汽油价格，他在接受路透社独家采访时称，美军行动是他的首要任务。【原文：President Donald Trump said on Thursday he was not concerned about rising U.S. gas prices driven by the widening Iran conflict, telling Reuters in ​an exclusive interview that the U.S. military operation was his priority.】

item.title: 美国民主党人正着手制定法案以规范预测市场，此前该市场出现针对伊朗的投注活动。
item.description: 美国民主党议员迈克·莱文众议员和克里斯·墨菲参议员正着手制定一项法案，旨在规范预测市场。此前在美以对伊朗实施空袭前夕，预测市场出现时机精准的押注行为，引发了业界对这类交易合法性与道德性的担忧。莱文向路透社透露了这一动向。【原文：U.S. Democratic ​lawmakers Representative Mike Levin and Senator Chris Murphy are working on a bill ‌to rein in prediction markets after well-timed bets ahead of the U.S.-Israeli air strikes in Iran stoked concerns over the legality and ethics of such trades, Levin told Reuters.】

item.title: 联邦调查局发言人表示，该机构已"识别并处理"其网络上的可疑网络活动。
item.description: 联邦调查局（FBI）周四表示，该机构已"识别并处理了其网络上的可疑活动"。【原文：The FBI "identified and ​addressed suspicious activities" ‌on its networks, an ​agency spokesperson ​said Thursday.】

item.title: 彭博社报道，甲骨文计划裁员数千人，因数据中心成本上升
item.description: 彭博社周四报道称，企业软件公司甲骨文正计划裁减数千个岗位，因其在推进大规模人工智能数据中心扩建计划时面临现金短缺困境。【原文：Enterprise software company Oracle is planning thousands of job cuts as it faces a cash ​crunch from a massive AI data center expansion effort, ‌Bloomberg News reported on Thursday.】

item.title: 委内瑞拉政府与壳牌公司签署石油协议，国家电视台报道
item.description: 委内瑞拉国家电视台周四报道称，该国代理总统德尔西·罗德里格斯已与国际石油巨头壳牌签署石油协议，但未透露具体细节。【原文：Venezuela's acting President Delcy Rodriguez has signed oil deals with international ​major Shell , state television said on Thursday, without ‌providing any details.】

item.title: 卡车运力紧张为美国铁路夺回货运市场创造机遇
item.description: 美国铁路公司包括CSX公司、联合太平洋铁路公司和伯灵顿北方圣达菲铁路公司正积极争取从卡车运输商手中夺回货运业务，因卡车运输能力趋紧及公路运输费率上涨正增强铁路运输的竞争力。【原文：U.S. railroads including CSX Corp , Union Pacific and BNSF are moving to recapture freight from truckers as tightening trucking capacity and rising road-haul rates bolster rail's competitive position.】

item.title: 虽受重创但未被击垮：投资者称新兴市场或能承受中东冲击
item.description: 自中东战火蔓延以来，风险资产遭遇资金撤离潮，令新兴市场动荡不安。但部分投资者押注，经济基本面与碎片化的地缘政治格局将推动持续一年的涨势重启。【原文：The rush of cash out of risk assets has rattled emerging markets since war engulfed the Middle East, but some investors are betting that economic fundamentals and fragmented geopolitics will allow a year-long rally to ​resume.】

item.title: 美国24个州宣布提起诉讼，阻止特朗普最新全球关税措施
item.description: 美国24个州将于周四起诉唐纳德·特朗普政府，这是针对其新实施的10%全球关税的首起法律诉讼。这些州表示，总统无权援引新的法律依据来规避美国最高法院近期的一项裁决——该裁决已使特朗普此前对进口商品征收的大部分关税失效。【原文：A group ​of 24 U.S. states will sue President Donald Trump's administration on Thursday in the first legal challenge to ‌his newly imposed 10% global tariffs, alleging that the president cannot sidestep a recent U.S. Supreme Court ruling that invalidated most of his previous tariffs on imported goods by citing new legal authority, according to the states.】

item.title: 蓝猫头鹰创纪录地吸引空头押注，私募信贷持续承压
item.description: 做空者正加码押注私募信贷公司蓝猫资本，当前做空兴趣已达历史峰值。与此同时，私募贷款行业正遭受流动性与信贷质量问题的双重冲击。【原文：Short sellers have ratcheted up bets against private credit firm Blue Owl Capital, with short interest standing at all-time highs at a ​time when the private lending industry has been hammered by liquidity ‌and credit quality concerns.】

item.title: 环球音乐因市场不确定性暂停美国上市计划
item.description: 环球音乐集团——全球最大的唱片公司——周四宣布暂停在美国上市的计划，理由是市场存在不确定性。【原文：Universal Music Group , the ‌world's biggest music label, on Thursday put plans for a stock market listing in the United States on hold, ​citing market uncertainty.】

item.title: 独家：消息人士称，随着柏林寻求减少对美国的依赖，Uniper正与加拿大就液化天然气进行谈判
item.description: 知情人士透露，德国国有能源集团Uniper正与加拿大商谈扩大液化天然气采购事宜。此举是柏林政府计划建立广泛经济伙伴关系、减少对美国供应依赖的一部分。【原文：State-owned German energy group Uniper is holding talks with Canada to expand its ‌liquefied natural gas purchases, three people familiar with the matter said, as part of Berlin's plans to strike a broad economic partnership and cut reliance on U.S. supplies.】

item.title: 普拉达计划缩减范思哲的零售网点并降低品牌定位
item.description: 普拉达计划提升其新收购的范思哲品牌全价商品销售额，并削减该品牌的副线产品。该品牌在新任创意总监彼得·穆勒尔执掌下的首个系列预计将于2027年推出。【原文：Prada plans to increase full-price sales and cut secondary lines at its recently acquired Versace brand, whose ​first collection under new creative director Pieter Mulier in ‌expected only in 2027.】

item.title: 班尼杰集团在与All3Media合并前瞄准特许经营扩张
item.description: 法国娱乐集团Banijay周四宣布，在与All3Media合并业务之前，将把特许经营业务从电视领域拓展至现场活动，作为2026年及之后的主要增长引擎。【原文：French entertainment group Banijay on Thursday flagged franchise growth beyond TV and into ​live events as major growth drivers for 2026 and beyond, ‌ahead of merging its operations with All3Media.】

item.title: 在线旅游股上涨，因有报道称OpenAI将缩减直接结账业务
item.description: 在线旅游代理商股价周四大幅上涨，此前有报道称OpenAI正缩减将直接预订功能整合至ChatGPT的计划，这缓解了投资者对人工智能聊天机器人最终可能绕过旅游中介的担忧。【原文：Shares of online travel agencies surged on Thursday after a report that OpenAI is scaling ​back plans to integrate direct bookings into ‌ChatGPT, easing investor fears that the AI chatbots could eventually cut out travel intermediaries.】

item.title: 航空公司和旅游集团警告称，随着部分政府停摆持续，航空交通面临风险
item.description: 美国主要航空公司和旅游集团的代表周四警告称，随着繁忙的美国春假旅行季临近，持续的部分政府停摆可能导致航空交通中断。【原文：Groups representing major ​U.S. airlines and ‌travel groups on Thursday ​warned an ​ongoing partial government shutdown ⁠could snap ​air traffic as ​the busy U.S. spring break travel ​season nears.】

item.title: 美联储终止对富国银行因虚假账户丑闻实施的执法行动
item.description: 美国联邦储备委员会周四宣布，已终止对富国银行实施的执法行动。此前该银行因大规模虚假账户丑闻受到处罚，美联储表示该行已充分改革其运营体系。【原文：The U.S. Federal ​Reserve announced Thursday ‌that it had terminated the enforcement ​action it ​imposed on Wells Fargo ⁠following the ​bank's widespread fake ​accounts scandal, saying the bank had sufficiently ​overhauled its ​operations.】

item.title: 奈飞收购本·阿弗莱克的人工智能电影技术公司
item.description: 网飞公司周四宣布已收购InterPositive公司。这家由奥斯卡奖得主本·阿弗莱克创立的影视制作技术公司，致力于开发人工智能驱动的电影制作工具。【原文：Netflix said on Thursday it has acquired InterPositive, a filmmaking technology company founded by Academy Award winner ​Ben Affleck that produces artificial intelligence-powered tools for movie ‌production.】

item.title: 美国众议院委员会要求旅游公司就人工智能定价问题作出说明
item.description: 美国众议院监督委员会主席周四要求优步、Lyft和Expedia等五家大型旅游公司首席执行官披露，是否通过监控消费者定价来抬高费用。【原文：The chair of the U.S. House ​Oversight Committee on Thursday asked ‌the CEOs of five major travel companies including Uber, ​Lyft and Expedia to ​disclose if they were ⁠using surveillance pricing of ​consumers to hike costs.】

item.title: 中东冲突推动投资者涌入货币市场基金
item.description: 全球投资者正蜂拥涌入货币市场基金，因中东冲突升级加剧了市场对油价冲击、通胀攀升及利率上升的担忧。【原文：Global investors are flocking ​to money ‌market funds as an escalating ​Middle ​East conflict fuels fears ⁠of an ​oil price ​shock, rising inflation and higher interest ​rates.】

item.title: Sage公司筹集6500万美元资金，用于扩大面向美国老年人的AI辅助护理服务
item.description: 总部位于纽约的老年护理科技公司Sage周四宣布，已完成6500万美元新一轮融资，用于扩展其人工智能平台。该平台旨在为养老院和辅助生活设施的护理人员提供支持。【原文：Sage, a New York-based senior care technology firm, said on Thursday it has raised $65 million in ​new funding to expand its artificial intelligence platform ‌designed to help caregivers in nursing homes and assisted living facilities.】

item.title: 特朗普与邦迪因批准字节跳动TikTok美国资产出售案面临诉讼
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普和司法部长帕姆·邦迪周四因美国政府批准TikTok中国母公司字节跳动建立美国控股合资企业的交易而被起诉。原告称该批准决定违法，且不符合2024年法律的要求。【原文：President Donald Trump and Attorney General Pam Bondi ​were sued Thursday over the ‌U.S. government's approval of a deal by TikTok's Chinese owner ByteDance to ​establish a majority American-owned ​joint venture, saying the approval was ⁠illegal and did not ​meet the requirements of a 2024 ​law.】

item.title: 智利国家铜业公司与微软签署采矿业务人工智能合作协议
item.description: 智利国有企业科德尔科（全球最大铜生产商）周四宣布，已与微软签署谅解备忘录，双方将评估在人工智能、高级分析、自动化及数字安全领域的合作计划。【原文：Chile's state-owned Codelco, the world's largest copper producer, and Microsoft signed a ​memorandum of understanding to evaluate joint initiatives ‌in artificial intelligence, advanced analytics, automation and digital security, the miner said on Thursday.】

item.title: 资本品价格上涨推高美国1月进口通胀
item.description: 美国政府周四公布的数据显示，1月份美国进口价格出现上涨，能源产品成本的下降被资本货物价格的飙升所抵消。【原文：U.S. import prices increased in January as a decline in the cost of energy products was more than offset by a surge in capital goods prices, government data ​showed on Thursday.】

item.title: 美国第四季度生产率增速放缓
item.description: 美国工人生产率在第四季度放缓，但整体趋势依然强劲，有效抑制了劳动力成本的增长。【原文：U.S. worker productivity slowed in the fourth quarter, but the trend remained solid, keeping growth in labor ​costs in check.】

item.title: CVS携手谷歌云推出人工智能驱动的健康平台
item.description: CVS Health周四宣布，将与谷歌母公司Alphabet旗下的谷歌云部门合作推出人工智能平台，该平台将整合多元化数据源，帮助客户实时管理健康状况。【原文：CVS Health will launch an AI-enabled platform in partnership with Alphabet's Google Cloud unit that will ​bring together data from diverse sources to help ‌customers manage their health in real time, they said on Thursday.】

item.title: 美联储巴金：顽固通胀与强劲就业数据或改变美联储风险展望 - 彭博电视
item.description: 里士满联储主席汤姆·巴金表示，当前通胀率仍居高不下，加之近期就业数据表现强劲，可能改变美联储的风险展望。与此同时，美国与伊朗的冲突可能进一步推高关键消费价格。【原文：Richmond Fed president Tom Barkin said still high inflation ​and stronger recent jobs numbers may ‌shift the Fed's risk outlook at a time when the U.S. conflict with ​Iran could further push up ​key consumer prices.】

item.title: 美元、债券还是黄金——哪种才是最安全的避风港？
item.description: 中东局势动荡再度引发投资者争相寻求避险资产，由此重新点燃了关于哪些资产能在危机时期真正提供保护的争论。【原文：Turmoil in the Middle East has sent investors scrambling for safety once more, reigniting a debate over which assets truly offer protection in times of stress.】

item.title: 亚马逊推出人工智能平台，实现医疗行政任务自动化
item.description: 亚马逊云服务部门AWS周四宣布推出一款人工智能平台，旨在为患者提供便捷的医疗服务，同时减轻医疗服务提供者的行政负担。【原文：Amazon's cloud unit, AWS, said on Thursday it had launched an artificial intelligence-enabled platform ​that aims to ease access to care for ‌patients and cut administrative work for healthcare providers.】

item.title: 美国当周初请失业金人数持平；2月裁员量下降55%
item.description: 上周美国初请失业金人数持平，而2月份裁员人数大幅下降，这与稳定的劳动力市场状况相一致。【原文：The number of Americans filing new applications for unemployment benefits was unchanged last week while layoffs dropped sharply in February, consistent with stable labor market conditions.】
